unilateral_rent_increase.title: Karnataka Rent Act, 1999 — Section 10
unilateral_rent_increase.summary: The Act includes a specific provision titled Notice of revision of rent.

no_receipts.title: Karnataka Rent Act, 1999 — Section 16
no_receipts.summary: The Act includes a provision requiring a receipt for rent and other charges paid, subject to the Act's applicability.

unregistered_agreement.title: Karnataka Rent Act, 1999 — Section 4
unregistered_agreement.summary: The Act includes a provision titled Tenancy agreement to be in writing.

insufficient_eviction_notice.title: Karnataka Rent Act, 1999 — Section 27
insufficient_eviction_notice.summary: The Act regulates protection against eviction and the grounds under which recovery of possession may be sought; applicability and facts must be checked.
